title: Strait of Hormuz Crisis Data
subtitle: Daily transits, the Hormuz Index, oil prices, and a cited event log

resources.description: Daily vessel-transit counts through the Strait of Hormuz (IMF PortWatch). Columns: date, n_total, n_tanker, n_cargo. The series the major prediction-market reopening contracts resolve on. Underlying data (c) IMF PortWatch; cite IMF when republishing.
Composite Hormuz Index at 5-minute resolution, last 7 days. Columns: timestamp_iso, crisis_pressure (0-100), crisis_band, escalation_forecast (0-100), forecast_band. CC0.
Daily open/high/low/close/mean rollup of both index composites. CC0.
Brent and WTI crude spot prices, timestamped. Columns: timestamp_iso, brent_usd, wti_usd. Free to use, attribution requested.
Indexed strikes, ship incidents, closures, and diplomatic developments, each with a cited source URL. Free to use, per-row sources inline.
One-row snapshot of the current dashboard state (verdict, throughput, Brent, insurance multiple, Hormuz Index summary). CC0.
